branch_reason: Phase 10 delivered on the Phase 10 branch; publication, promotion, and merge remain explicitly human-approved separate actions.

commands.details: Normal sandbox write check failed, so Phase 10 used narrow approved escalation for the installed-skill maintenance update and repository-local test update.
Approved narrow escalation updated inspect_delivery_state.py, state-log-and-branches.md, troubleshooting.md, and tests/test_helper_scripts.py.
Seven helper-script fixture tests passed, including the new repository-root automation layout scenario.
Status inspection now finds automation/autonomous-roadmap-delivery-skill/delivery_state.json and reports only the expected dirty-worktree warning before final bookkeeping.
Current artifact validation returned no errors. Expected warnings remain for dirty worktree and the app automation prompt hard-stop guard; automation readback showed PAUSED.

commands.command: rg -n "Setup new automation|Deliver one current phase|Handle review findings|Inspect status|Finalize|Repair bad state|references/(setup-automation|phase-loop|review-and-fix|state-log-and-branches|finalization-and-promotion|troubleshooting)\.md|Maintenance Checklist|Repository Layout Mismatch" $CODEX_HOME/skills/autonomous-roadmap-delivery
commands.details: Confirmed SKILL.md still routes to all references and the Phase 10 maintenance/troubleshooting additions exist.

last_review.summary: Phase 10 operational hardening is delivered; all roadmap phases are complete locally.

permission_strategy.details: The saved automation prompt now applies permission handling to any current phase whose owned files, required verification, or targeted checks touch $CODEX_HOME/skills or $CODEX_HOME/skills/autonomous-roadmap-delivery. Future runs must try the normal sandbox command first, then request narrow command-scoped escalation for only the exact write or validation command before marking the phase blocked.
permission_strategy.cwds_policy: Keep cwds rooted only in $ROADMAP_REPO_ROOT; do not add $CODEX_HOME/skills or patch Codex global state.

privacy_sanitization.details: Committed review artifacts use placeholders for local home paths, roadmap repository paths, temp directories, pilot repository names, pilot roadmap slugs, repository owner strings, and test email values.

fixes: inspect_delivery_state.py reports missing automation config as a warning instead of exiting 2
validate_delivery_artifacts.py supports --allow-warning for strict-mode expected warnings
tests cover missing automation config, branch mismatch, missing state, invalid state JSON, and strict warning allowlist behavior
Phase 0 review artifacts use inline Verdict fields consistently
repository skill snapshot and installed skill package match after the fixes
